title: Red Hat Security Advisory: podman security update
overview:
An update for podman is now available for Red Hat Enterprise Linux 10.

Red Hat Product Security has rated this update as having a security impact of Important. A Common Vulnerability Scoring System (CVSS) base score, which gives a detailed severity rating, is available for each vulnerability from the CVE link(s) in the References section.

affected_products: Red Hat Enterprise Linux CodeReady Linux Builder (v. 10)
full_text:
Red Hat Security Advisory: podman security update

An update for podman is now available for Red Hat Enterprise Linux 10.

Red Hat Product Security has rated this update as having a security impact of Important. A Common Vulnerability Scoring System (CVSS) base score, which gives a detailed severity rating, is available for each vulnerability from the CVE link(s) in the References section.

An update for podman is now available for Red Hat Enterprise Linux 10.

Red Hat Product Security has rated this update as having a security impact of Important. A Common Vulnerability Scoring System (CVSS) base score, which gives a detailed severity rating, is available for each vulnerability from the CVE link(s) in the References section.

Updated Packages:
podman-5.6.0-5.el10_1.src.rpm
podman-5.6.0-5.el10_1.x86_64.rpm
podman-debuginfo-5.6.0-5.el10_1.x86_64.rpm
podman-debugsource-5.6.0-5.el10_1.x86_64.rpm
podman-docker-5.6.0-5.el10_1.noarch.rpm
podman-remote-5.6.0-5.el10_1.x86_64.rpm
podman-remote-debuginfo-5.6.0-5.el10_1.x86_64.rpm
podman-tests-debuginfo-5.6.0-5.el10_1.x86_64.rpm
podman-5.6.0-5.el10_1.s390x.rpm
podman-debuginfo-5.6.0-5.el10_1.s390x.rpm
podman-debugsource-5.6.0-5.el10_1.s390x.rpm
podman-remote-5.6.0-5.el10_1.s390x.rpm
podman-remote-debuginfo-5.6.0-5.el10_1.s390x.rpm
podman-tests-debuginfo-5.6.0-5.el10_1.s390x.rpm
podman-5.6.0-5.el10_1.ppc64le.rpm
podman-debuginfo-5.6.0-5.el10_1.ppc64le.rpm
podman-debugsource-5.6.0-5.el10_1.ppc64le.rpm
podman-remote-5.6.0-5.el10_1.ppc64le.rpm
podman-remote-debuginfo-5.6.0-5.el10_1.ppc64le.rpm
podman-tests-debuginfo-5.6.0-5.el10_1.ppc64le.rpm
podman-5.6.0-5.el10_1.aarch64.rpm
podman-debuginfo-5.6.0-5.el10_1.aarch64.rpm
podman-debugsource-5.6.0-5.el10_1.aarch64.rpm
podman-remote-5.6.0-5.el10_1.aarch64.rpm
podman-remote-debuginfo-5.6.0-5.el10_1.aarch64.rpm
podman-tests-debuginfo-5.6.0-5.el10_1.aarch64.rpm
podman-tests-5.6.0-5.el10_1.x86_64.rpm
podman-tests-5.6.0-5.el10_1.ppc64le.rpm
podman-tests-5.6.0-5.el10_1.aarch64.rpm
podman-tests-5.6.0-5.el10_1.s390x.rpm

CVE-2025-9566: There's a vulnerability in podman where an attacker may use the kube play command to overwrite host files when the kube file container a Secrete or a ConfigMap volume mount and such volume contains a symbolic link to a host file path. In a successful attack, the attacker can only control the target file to be overwritten but not the content to be written into the file.

Binary-Affected: podman
Upstream-version-introduced: v4.0.0
Upstream-version-fixed: v5.6.1

CVE-2025-47907: A flaw was found in database/sql. Concurrent queries can produce unexpected results when a query is cancelled during a Scan method call on returned Rows, creating a race condition. This vulnerability allows an attacker who can initiate and cancel queries to trigger this condition, possibly leading to inconsistent data being returned to the application.
